staff_copy_rule: Call it shadow or summary-only and state it is non-authoritative
Explain that prior context is readable while writes stay suppressed
Reserve footprint and describe trust-envelope check without taking over the shell
Name why detail is held back and keep the case canvas authoritative
Keep host available but quiet until the user opens it
Expose current posture to assistive tech and keep toggle reachable
Keep the rail attached to the workspace below the status strip
